criteria.text: Provide and fully deliver the higher education courses advertised.
criteria.threshold: Complete delivery of all advertised higher education courses as marketed to students
risk_indicators: Cancellation or significant modification of advertised courses without adequate notice
Failure to deliver promised course content, facilities, or resources
Misleading marketing materials that do not reflect actual course delivery
Student complaints about courses not matching advertised descriptions

criteria.text: Continue to comply with all conditions of its registration.
criteria.threshold: Ongoing compliance with all OfS conditions of registration
risk_indicators: Breach notifications or regulatory interventions from OfS
Failure to submit required returns or data to OfS on time
Non-compliance findings in monitoring or assessment activities
Inability to demonstrate compliance when requested by OfS

criteria.text: Operate in accordance with its governing documents.
criteria.threshold: Full compliance with constitutional documents and governance frameworks
risk_indicators: Decisions made outside constitutional authority or beyond governing document provisions
Failure to follow prescribed governance procedures for key decisions
Operating structures that contradict stated governance arrangements
Board or committee actions that exceed delegated powers

criteria.text: Deliver, in practice, the public interest governance principles that are applicable to it.
criteria.threshold: Demonstrable implementation of relevant public interest governance principles
risk_indicators: Governance decisions prioritizing private over public interest
Lack of transparency in decision-making processes
Absence of accountability mechanisms for governance failures
Conflicts of interest not properly managed or declared

criteria.text: Provide and fully deliver the higher education courses advertised.
criteria.threshold: Complete delivery of all marketed and enrolled courses as advertised
risk_indicators: Course cancellations or significant modifications after student enrollment
Failure to deliver advertised course content or learning outcomes
Marketing materials that misrepresent actual course provision
Students unable to complete advertised qualifications due to provision gaps

criteria.text: Continue to comply with all conditions of its registration.
criteria.threshold: Ongoing compliance with all OfS registration conditions
risk_indicators: Breach notifications or compliance failures reported to OfS
Internal audit findings indicating condition non-compliance
Governance systems inadequate to monitor regulatory compliance
Failure to implement corrective actions for identified compliance gaps

conditions.notes: This condition requires providers to demonstrate effective management and governance arrangements. Assessment covers organizational structures, decision-making processes, and accountability mechanisms.

conditions.title: Accountability

criteria.text: The provider must have in place adequate and effective arrangements for the management of financial resources so as to ensure that the provider can deliver the higher education courses that it has determined it will provide to enrolled students.
criteria.threshold: Adequate and effective financial management arrangements to deliver planned courses
risk_indicators: Cash flow projections showing inability to meet operational expenses for planned courses
Significant budget variances without corresponding risk management responses
Evidence of course closures or cancellations due to financial constraints
Audit findings indicating inadequate financial controls or governance

criteria.text: The governing body of the provider must be able to demonstrate that it exercises oversight of the management of the provider, including oversight of academic matters.
criteria.threshold: Governing body exercises demonstrable oversight of management and academic matters
risk_indicators: Governing body meetings lack academic agenda items or academic representation
Management decisions made without governing body knowledge or approval
No evidence of governing body challenging or scrutinizing management decisions
Governing body minutes show passive approval without substantive discussion

criteria.text: Accept responsibility for the interactions between the provider and the OfS and its designated bodies.
criteria.threshold: Governing body takes responsibility for all provider interactions with OfS
risk_indicators: Provider interactions with OfS lack governing body oversight or approval
Communications with OfS are not open and honest
Governing body delegates OfS interactions without maintaining accountability
Provider fails to inform governing body of regulatory correspondence or requirements

criteria.text: Ensure the provider's compliance with all of its conditions of registration and with the OfS's accounts direction.
criteria.threshold: Full compliance with all registration conditions and accounts direction maintained
risk_indicators: Breaches of any conditions of registration occur
Provider fails to meet accounts direction disclosure requirements
Inadequate systems for monitoring compliance with registration conditions
Delayed or incomplete responses to OfS regulatory requirements

criteria.text: Nominate to the OfS a senior officer as the 'accountable officer' who has the responsibilities set out by the OfS for an accountable officer from time to time.
criteria.threshold: Suitable senior officer nominated and functioning as accountable officer
risk_indicators: No accountable officer nominated or appointed individual not suitable
Accountable officer fails to discharge responsibilities effectively
Changes in accountable officer not promptly communicated to OfS
Accountable officer unable to discharge responsibilities without timely notification

criteria.text: Accept responsibility for the interactions between the provider and the OfS and its designated bodies.
criteria.threshold: Governing body formally accepts and demonstrates responsibility for all OfS interactions
risk_indicators: Governing body delegates OfS interactions without retaining oversight responsibility
Minutes show governing body is unaware of ongoing OfS correspondence or requirements
Multiple contradictory communications sent to OfS from different parts of the institution
Governing body claims lack of awareness when OfS raises compliance concerns

criteria.text: Ensure the provider's compliance with all of its Ongoing conditions of registration and with the OfS's accounts direction.
criteria.threshold: Governing body actively ensures and monitors compliance with all ongoing conditions and accounts direction
risk_indicators: Governing body receives no regular compliance reporting on OfS conditions
Evidence of non-compliance with ongoing conditions that governing body was unaware of
Failure to follow OfS accounts direction requirements
No systematic process for monitoring compliance with registration conditions

criteria.text: Nominate to the OfS a senior officer as the 'accountable officer' who has the responsibilities set out by the OfS for an accountable officer from time to time.
criteria.threshold: Governing body nominates and maintains an appropriate senior officer as accountable officer with defined OfS responsibilities
risk_indicators: No accountable officer nominated to OfS or nomination significantly delayed
Accountable officer lacks sufficient seniority or authority within the institution
Accountable officer unaware of their OfS-defined responsibilities
Changes to accountable officer not promptly communicated to OfS

conditions.notes: This condition focuses on ensuring providers have robust financial management systems to maintain continuity of education delivery. Assessment involves reviewing financial planning, monitoring systems, and governance arrangements.

conditions.title: Notification of changes to the Register

criteria.text: The provider must notify the OfS of changes that may affect its registration status or conditions
criteria.threshold: Timely notification of material changes to OfS
risk_indicators: Failure to notify OfS of significant organizational changes within required timeframes
Changes to legal structure, ownership, or control not reported
Material changes to academic provision or financial position not disclosed
OfS discovers changes through third-party sources rather than provider notification

criteria.text: The registered provider must inform the OfS of any change (or any proposed change) which affects the basis on which the provider is registered.
criteria.threshold: Timely notification of all material changes affecting registration basis
risk_indicators: Material changes to legal status, ownership, or governance structure not reported to OfS
Significant changes to course portfolio or student numbers without notification
Changes to degree-awarding powers or university title status not communicated
Delays or gaps in reporting structural or operational changes to the regulator

criteria.text: The governing body of the provider must notify the OfS of any change of which it becomes aware which affects the accuracy of the information contained in the provider's entry in the Register.
criteria.threshold: Notify OfS within 28 days of becoming aware of any change affecting Register accuracy, with supporting evidence
risk_indicators: Provider fails to update OfS within 28 days of becoming aware of changes affecting Register information
Inaccurate information identified on the Register that the provider was aware of but failed to report
Provider unable to provide supporting evidence when notifying changes to Register information
Provider fails to respond to OfS annual confirmation request for Register entry verification

criteria.text: The governing body of the provider must notify the OfS of any change of which it becomes aware which affects the accuracy of the information contained in the provider's entry in the Register.
criteria.threshold: Timely notification of all changes affecting Register accuracy
risk_indicators: Changes to institutional structure, ownership, or legal status not promptly reported to OfS
Updates to course offerings, student numbers, or key personnel made without corresponding Register notifications
Evidence of material changes occurring months before OfS notification
Governing body minutes showing awareness of significant changes but no record of OfS notification

conditions.notes: This condition requires providers to proactively inform the OfS of changes that could impact their registration status. The document references are incomplete in the provided text, with guidance appearing on page 171.

conditions.title: Facilitation of electoral registration

criteria.text: The provider must facilitate electoral registration
criteria.threshold: Evidence of active measures to support students in registering to vote
risk_indicators: Absence of electoral registration information or processes in student services
Low student electoral registration rates compared to institutional benchmarks
No partnerships or communication with local electoral registration offices
Student complaints about lack of support for voter registration

criteria.text: The provider must facilitate electoral registration for its students.
criteria.threshold: Systems and processes in place to actively support student electoral registration
risk_indicators: No evidence of electoral registration initiatives or communications to students
Student surveys showing low awareness of electoral registration support
Absence of partnerships with electoral registration officers or relevant authorities
No designated staff or processes for facilitating student electoral registration

criteria.text: The provider must comply with guidance published by the OfS to facilitate, in cooperation with electoral registration officers, the electoral registration of students.
criteria.threshold: Compliance with OfS guidance to facilitate electoral registration through cooperation with electoral registration officers
risk_indicators: Electoral registration officer reports lack of cooperation from the provider
Students are not aware of how they should register to vote
Provider fails to provide information to electoral registration officer when requested under regulation 23
Low student electoral registration rates compared to sector norms

conditions.notes: This condition requires providers to actively support students in the electoral registration process to ensure democratic participation opportunities are facilitated.

conditions.title: University Title Eligibility and Requirements

criteria.text: A higher education provider is eligible to apply for university college title when it: a. Is registered with the OfS. b. Satisfies all of its ongoing conditions of registration. c. Has obtained authorisation to grant taught awards (other than foundation degree only DAPs) or research awards and where that authorisation is not time limited.
criteria.threshold: Must be OfS registered, satisfy all ongoing conditions, and hold unlimited taught or research award authorisation
risk_indicators: Provider fails to meet ongoing conditions of registration requirements
Time-limited degree awarding powers approaching expiration
Regulatory interventions or sanctions imposed by OfS
Significant changes in governance or management structure

criteria.text: A higher education provider is eligible to apply for university title when it meets the criteria for university college title above and, in addition, the following criterion: The number of full time equivalent higher education students must exceed 55 per cent of the total number of full time equivalent students, of which at least 50 per cent must be on courses at level 6 or above on the Framework for Higher Education Qualifications.
criteria.threshold: Must meet university college criteria plus >55% FTE higher education students with ≥50% at level 6 or above
risk_indicators: Declining proportion of higher education students relative to total enrollment
Reduction in level 6+ course offerings or student numbers
Shift toward lower-level qualifications or non-HE provision
Student data reporting inconsistencies or gaps

criteria.text: Where a provider is subject to one or more specific ongoing conditions of registration, and the OfS considers these to be relevant, for example because they have been imposed to mitigate increased risk of a breach of an ongoing conditions relating to quality, standards, financial viability and sustainability, and management or governance, an application for university college or university title may be refused for that reason.
criteria.threshold: Must not be subject to relevant specific ongoing conditions that indicate quality, standards, financial, or governance risks
risk_indicators: Imposition of specific ongoing conditions by OfS
Quality or standards concerns identified in monitoring
Financial viability warnings or sustainability issues
Management or governance failures requiring regulatory intervention

criteria.text: The OfS may revoke university college title and university title, but only if certain conditions are met. There are three conditions, of which at least one must be met for the OfS to take the step of revocation. In the vast majority of scenarios, the OfS would expect to have made use of its other intervention powers before taking the step of revocation.
criteria.threshold: Must maintain eligibility criteria to avoid revocation; OfS will typically exhaust other interventions first
risk_indicators: Serious breaches of ongoing conditions of registration
Loss of degree awarding powers or authorisation
Persistent non-compliance despite regulatory interventions
Fundamental changes that no longer meet title criteria

conditions.notes: University title requirements build upon university college title criteria. Student numbers calculated using DDB or ILR data based on study intensity. Further education sector providers must re-incorporate as higher education corporations before eligibility. Providers must consult on proposed names and avoid confusing or misleading titles. Chartered bodies and Private Act providers have specific name change procedures.

conditions.title: Additional monitoring and specific ongoing conditions following initial condition satisfaction

criteria.text: Where the OfS considers this initial condition to be satisfied, but that there is an increased risk of a breach of one or more of the general ongoing conditions for quality (conditions B1, B2 and B4), or a wider regulatory concern, it may impose one or more specific ongoing conditions of registration and will also consider whether additional monitoring requirements are appropriate, for example, a requirement to report additional matters as reportable events, or to have an additional assessment by the OfS, the designated quality body, or other appropriate body.
criteria.threshold: Compliance with any imposed specific ongoing conditions and additional monitoring requirements
risk_indicators: Failure to report additional matters as required reportable events
Non-compliance with imposed specific ongoing conditions of registration
Refusal or inability to undergo additional assessments by OfS or designated quality body
Evidence of continuing quality concerns despite initial condition satisfaction

conditions.notes: This condition applies where an initial condition is satisfied but increased risk remains regarding general ongoing quality conditions (B1, B2, B4) or wider regulatory concerns. The OfS has discretionary powers to impose additional monitoring and specific conditions.

conditions.title: Financial viability and sustainability

criteria.text: Be financially viable.
criteria.threshold: No material risk of insolvency within three years
risk_indicators: Deteriorating cash flow trends in recent financial statements
Approaching expiry of key financial facilities without renewal arrangements
Increasing reliance on demand facilities or short-term financing
Material unexplained losses or deficits in audited accounts

criteria.text: Be financially sustainable.
criteria.threshold: Sufficient financial resources to operate for five years and meet all registration conditions
risk_indicators: Financial forecasts showing persistent losses without credible recovery plans
Declining student numbers affecting revenue sustainability
Balance sheet showing liabilities approaching or exceeding assets
Inability to generate appropriate levels of cash and profit or surplus

criteria.text: Have the necessary financial resources to provide and fully deliver the higher education courses as it has advertised and as it has contracted to deliver them.
criteria.threshold: Adequate resources to complete all advertised and contracted course delivery
risk_indicators: Course delivery costs exceeding available resources in financial projections
Reductions in teaching staff or learning resources affecting course delivery
Student complaints about inadequate facilities or teaching provision
Evidence of course cancellations or significant modifications due to resource constraints

criteria.text: Have the necessary financial resources to continue to comply with all conditions of its registration.
criteria.threshold: Financial capacity to meet all ongoing registration requirements
risk_indicators: Budget allocations insufficient for compliance activities and systems
Delays in regulatory reporting due to resource constraints
Reduction in quality assurance or governance functions due to financial pressures
Evidence of cutting essential compliance-related expenditure

conditions.notes: Applies to all registered providers as both initial and ongoing condition. Information submitted for this condition is also used by OfS to monitor financial sustainability under section 68 of HERA. Financial viability means no material risk of insolvency within three years. Financial sustainability requires sufficient resources for five years and ability to operate according to plans. OfS judgements are made solely for regulatory purposes with no responsibility to providers or third parties. Third-party financial support must meet specific legal requirements to be considered.

conditions.title: For the purpose of assisting the OfS in performing any function, or exercising any power, conferred on the OfS under any legislation, the governing body of a provider must:

criteria.text: Provide the OfS, or a person nominated by the OfS, with such information as the OfS specifies at the time and in the manner and form specified.
criteria.threshold: Full compliance with OfS information requests in specified format and timeframe
risk_indicators: Delays or failures to respond to OfS information requests within specified deadlines
Provision of incomplete or inaccurate data to OfS or nominated persons
Failure to provide information in the specified format or manner
Patterns of non-responsiveness to regulatory inquiries

criteria.text: Permit the OfS to verify, or arrange for the independent verification by a person nominated by the OfS of such information as the OfS specifies at the time and in the manner specified and must notify the OfS of the outcome of any independent verification at the time and in
criteria.threshold: Allow verification processes and report verification outcomes to OfS
risk_indicators: Refusal to permit OfS or nominated persons to verify information
Obstruction of independent verification processes
Failure to notify OfS of verification outcomes within required timeframes
Disputes or conflicts arising during verification activities

criteria.text: Take such steps as the OfS reasonably requests to co-operate with any monitoring or investigation by the OfS, in particular, but not limited to, providing explanations or making available documents to the OfS or a person nominated by it or making available members of staff to meet with the OfS or a person nominated by it.
criteria.threshold: Full cooperation with OfS monitoring and investigations including access to staff and documents
risk_indicators: Staff unavailable or refusing to meet with OfS representatives
Withholding or restricting access to relevant documents during investigations
Failure to provide adequate explanations when requested by OfS
Non-cooperation with reasonable OfS monitoring activities

conditions.notes: The requirements in paragraphs (ii) and (iii) do not affect the generality of the requirement in paragraph (i).
